_note: Per-lesson role-play scenario. Grounded in A2/004 dialogue + vocab. Learner plays Anna; computer plays Tom. Each NPC node offers 2-3 branches so the same lesson language can be reached different ways. Consumed by RP.Engine + RP.classifiers.local (see roleplay/).
title: 004 · The School Trip

npc.text: Where will we go on the school trip?

routes.meaning: Anna says they will go to the science museum.
examples: We will go to the science museum.
We'll go to the science museum.
We are going to the science museum.
To the science museum!
routes.hint: Say the place: “We will go to the science museum.”

routes.meaning: Anna is not sure and asks Tom.
examples: I'm not sure. Where do you think?
I don't know yet. Do you?
Maybe the zoo? I'm not sure.
Hmm, where do you think we'll go?
routes.hint: You can guess, or say “We will go to the science museum.”

partial.message: Tell Tom the place: “We will go to the science museum.”

off_topic.message: Tom asked where the trip is. Try “We will go to the science museum.”

npc.text: I heard we will go to the science museum!

routes.meaning: Anna reacts happily to the science museum.
examples: Great! I can't wait.
Cool! The science museum sounds fun.
Awesome! I love museums.
Yes! We will go to the science museum.
routes.hint: React with joy: “Great! I can't wait.”

partial.message: React to the news: “Great! I can't wait.”

off_topic.message: Tom heard it's the museum. Try “Great! I can't wait.”

npc.text: That sounds fun! How will we get there?

routes.meaning: Anna says they will go by bus.
examples: We will go by bus.
We'll go by bus.
We are going by bus.
By bus!
routes.hint: Say how: “We will go by bus.”

routes.meaning: Anna says they will take the school bus.
examples: We will take the school bus.
We'll go on the school bus.
By the big school bus.
We will ride the bus together.
routes.hint: You can say “We will go by bus.”

partial.message: Tell Tom how: “We will go by bus.”

off_topic.message: Tom asked how you get there. Try “We will go by bus.”

npc.text: What will we see at the museum?

routes.meaning: Anna says they will see robots and dinosaurs.
examples: We will see robots and dinosaurs.
We'll see robots and dinosaurs.
We are going to see robots and dinosaurs.
Robots and dinosaurs!
routes.hint: Say what you'll see: “We will see robots and dinosaurs.”

routes.meaning: Anna mentions robots and other cool things.
examples: We will see many robots.
We'll see robots and cool machines.
There will be robots and dinosaurs.
We will see big dinosaurs!
routes.hint: You can say “We will see robots and dinosaurs.”

partial.message: Tell Tom what you'll see: “We will see robots and dinosaurs.”

off_topic.message: Tom asked what you'll see. Try “We will see robots and dinosaurs.”

npc.text: I want to see the dinosaurs because they are huge.

routes.meaning: Anna reminds Tom not to forget his lunch.
examples: Don't forget to bring your lunch.
Don't forget your lunch!
Remember to bring your lunch.
Make sure you bring your lunch.
routes.hint: Remind Tom: “Don't forget to bring your lunch.”

routes.meaning: Anna agrees and reminds him about lunch.
examples: Me too! Don't forget your lunch.
The dinosaurs are huge! Bring your lunch too.
I like dinosaurs too. Don't forget your lunch.
Cool! And don't forget to bring your lunch.
routes.hint: You can say “Don't forget to bring your lunch.”

partial.message: Remind Tom: “Don't forget to bring your lunch.”

off_topic.message: Tom loves the dinosaurs. Try “Don't forget to bring your lunch.”

npc.text: I will bring a sandwich and some water.

routes.meaning: Anna says it will be a great day.
examples: It will be a great day!
It's going to be a great day!
This will be a great day!
Yes! It will be a great day.
routes.hint: End happily: “It will be a great day!”

routes.meaning: Anna praises the idea and says it will be a great day.
examples: Good idea! It will be a great day!
Nice! It's going to be a great day.
Perfect! It will be a great day.
Yummy! It will be a great day.
routes.hint: You can say “It will be a great day!”

partial.message: End the chat: “It will be a great day!”

off_topic.message: Time to finish. Try “It will be a great day!”

npc.text: Yes! I can't wait for our school trip. See you on the bus!
